title: Hakea lorea
taxonomy: Hakea lorea is classified within the family Proteaceae, which is a group of flowering plants native to Australia, New Zealand, and parts of the Pacific Islands. This family is characterized by the presence of distinctive flowers and seeds. Hakea lorea belongs to the genus Hakea, which comprises approximately 150 species of shrubs and trees. The genus Hakea is native to Australia and is known for its unique flowers and seed pods. Hakea lorea's classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants within the Proteaceae family.
